title: PrivateChat.invitedClients not thread-safe — concurrent crash
description: The invitedClients array is accessed from multiple threads (addInvitation, removeInvitation, isInvited) without any lock, while the parent Chat class correctly uses a Lock for its clients dictionary. Concurrent Swift array mutation causes crashes or logic errors from stale reads.
recommendation: Add a lock to protect invitedClients, the same way clientsLock protects the clients dictionary in the Chat class.
fix_summary: Added invitedClientsLock: Lock to PrivateChat. Wrapped addInvitation and removeInvitation with exclusivelyWrite, isInvited with concurrentlyRead.
